title: Lead Investment Banker at New India Assurance Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at New India Assurance Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About New India Assurance Advisory Limited:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance Advisory Limited!
